falsification_logic.confirm_like: A positive growth-of-DM proxy term improves the fit to public multi-redshift growth points with the sign expected for ongoing reduction.
falsification_logic.falsify_like: A constant-DM growth history fits equally well, or the preferred proxy term remains zero or wrong-sign.

notes: This is a compressed public full-shape/RSD proxy based on published DESI summary points.
A full perturbation-level implementation with public chains would be the next refinement once the proxy sign is established.
